data.title: CurveBeam AI Schedules Investor Webinar with Q3 Appendix 4C Release
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Curvebeam AI Ltd. ( (AU:CVB) ) has provided an announcement.

CurveBeam AI will release its quarterly Appendix 4C for the period ended 31 March 2026 before market open on 30 April, and is coupling the disclosure with an investor webinar hosted by its senior leadership team. The event, to be held at 9:30am AEST on the same day and later available as a recording, signals continued engagement with shareholders and the broader market as the company updates stakeholders on its financial and operational progress.

Investors and interested parties can register online to attend the webinar, submit questions live or in advance, and access a replay shortly after the session concludes. By structuring its quarterly results release around an interactive briefing, CurveBeam AI underscores its focus on transparency, potentially supporting investor confidence and liquidity in its ASX-listed shares as it pursues growth in the specialised medical imaging and AI diagnostics market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CVB) stock is a Hold with a A$0.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Curvebeam AI Ltd. stock, see the AU:CVB Stock Forecast page.

More about Curvebeam AI Ltd.

CurveBeam AI Limited is a medical technology company that develops, manufactures and sells specialised point-of-care CT imaging equipment paired with AI-enabled SaaS clinical assessment tools for musculoskeletal care. Its flagship HiRise scanner performs both weight-bearing and traditional CT scans, and the company operates from a corporate base in Melbourne with global headquarters in Hatfield, Pennsylvania, employing more than 70 staff.

data.title: Panoro Energy Sets Fully Virtual 2026 AGM for 21 May
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Panoro Energy ASA ( (PESAF) ) has issued an update.

Panoro Energy ASA has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for 21 May 2026 at 11:00am CEST, to be held exclusively as a virtual event via the Euronext Securities Portal, with no option for in-person attendance. Shareholders must be on the register as of 13 May 2026 to vote and are required to register their attendance by 19 May 2026 through Nordea Bank, after which they will receive access credentials for the online meeting.

The move to a fully digital AGM underscores Panoro’s continued use of electronic platforms for shareholder governance and may facilitate broader participation from its geographically dispersed investor base. By clearly setting record dates and attendance procedures, the company aims to ensure orderly decision-making and transparent engagement with shareholders across its African-focused portfolio of oil and gas assets.

More about Panoro Energy ASA

Panoro Energy ASA is an independent oil and gas exploration and production company based in London and listed on the main board of the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker PEN. The company holds production, exploration and development assets across Africa, including offshore licenses in Equatorial Guinea and southern Gabon, operated assets in Tunisia, and an onshore exploration right in South Africa.

data.title: Macquarie Group Exits Substantial Holder Position in Regis Resources
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Macquarie Group Limited ( (AU:MQG) ) has issued an update.

Macquarie Group Limited has notified Regis Resources Limited that it has ceased to be a substantial holder in the gold producer, lodging a formal notice under Australian corporations law. The change reflects adjustments in Macquarie’s relevant voting interests and associated entities’ holdings, as recorded in its substantial holder disclosure.

The filing, signed by company secretary Simone Kovacic, also updates Regis on changes in associations among Macquarie Group’s controlled bodies corporate, which collectively held the interest. This move may signal a repositioning of Macquarie’s exposure to Regis Resources, with implications for the miner’s share register and the visibility of institutional support in its investor base.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MQG) stock is a Hold with a A$235.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Macquarie Group Limited stock, see the AU:MQG Stock Forecast page.

More about Macquarie Group Limited

Macquarie Group Limited is a global financial services provider headquartered in Sydney, operating through entities such as Macquarie Bank Limited and Macquarie Investment Services Limited. The group is active across investment banking, asset management, and specialist financial services, with a wide network of controlled subsidiaries in infrastructure, energy, real assets, and other investment vehicles worldwide.

data.title: Neometals Rejects Mandrake Claim Dispute at Utah Brine Project
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Neometals Ltd ( (AU:NMT) ).

Neometals has issued a clarification regarding its Utah Brine Project after Mandrake Resources alleged that lithium placer claims filed by Utah Brine Corporation, in which Neometals holds a 51% stake, overlap Mandrake’s existing claims and are therefore invalid. The company firmly rejects these allegations, stating that UBC’s U.S. legal counsel has confirmed the claims were validly filed in good faith over land open to location, supported by affidavit testimony.

UBC has also asked Mandrake to relinquish regulatory operatorship of certain wells, arguing Mandrake’s right to use them has expired, so UBC can be formally recognised as the authorised operator under Utah regulations. In parallel, UBC has secured an exclusive access and use licence with American Helium and Ascent Resources over 23 existing wells, oil and gas leases and related infrastructure, enabling brine sampling, test work and potential extraction, while filing additional potash and lithium placer tenure applications tied to those wells.

The dispute highlights the strategic importance of operatorship and tenure control at the Utah Brine Project, a key asset within Neometals’ critical minerals portfolio. By asserting the validity of its claims and strengthening access rights, Neometals is seeking to protect its U.S. lithium and potassium brine position and preserve the potential for rapid, capital‑efficient development that aligns with its broader clean‑energy materials strategy.

More about Neometals Ltd

Neometals Ltd is an Australian company focused on enabling the sustainable production of critical and valuable materials for a cleaner future. Its portfolio spans upstream mineral assets, including the Barrambie gold project in Western Australia, a high‑grade titanium and vanadium deposit at Barrambie now in divestment, and a controlling stake in the Utah Brine Project in the U.S., alongside proprietary low‑cost processing technologies for lithium chemicals and vanadium recovery. The Utah Brine Project gives Neometals exclusive access to inactive gas wells and existing infrastructure over more than 80,000 acres in Utah, aligning with U.S. critical minerals policy and supporting potential for rapid, capital‑efficient exploration and evaluation.

YTD Price Performance: -29.51%

Average Trading Volume: 797,212

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$38.65M

Learn more about NMT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Anteris Technologies ( (AU:AVR) ) just unveiled an update.

Anteris Technologies Global Corp. has notified the market of the issue of new common stock following the conversion of unquoted options and other unquoted convertible securities. The company reported the issuance of a total of 74,969 AVRAAM common stock shares across several dates in April 2026, signaling ongoing utilisation of its equity-based instruments and a modest expansion of its share base.

These newly issued shares arise from the exercise or conversion of existing unquoted securities rather than a new capital raising, suggesting limited immediate dilution but confirming that previously granted equity incentives and instruments are moving into the listed capital structure. The activity underscores Anteris Technologies Global Corp.’s continued use of equity-linked securities in its financing and remuneration strategy, with implications for shareholders tracking incremental changes in the company’s outstanding stock.

data.title: Standard Chartered Sets Final 2025 Dividend and Multi-Currency Payout Terms
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) just unveiled an update.

Standard Chartered PLC has confirmed details of its 2025 final dividend, declaring a payout of USD 0.49 per ordinary share, with payment scheduled for 14 May 2026 to shareholders on the Hong Kong branch register at the opening of business on 20 March 2026. The dividend offers shareholders a currency election between pounds sterling, Hong Kong dollars and U.S. dollars, with indicative conversion rates set at approximately HKD 3.83746 and GBP 0.3629136 per share, underscoring the bank’s commitment to returning capital to investors across its key UK and Hong Kong markets and highlighting its ongoing engagement with an internationally diversified shareholder base.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a multinational banking and financial services group headquartered in London that focuses on retail, commercial and institutional banking across Asia, Africa and the Middle East. The group offers a broad range of services including deposits, lending, trade finance and wealth management, with its shares listed in Hong Kong under stock code 02888.

An announcement from Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd ( (AU:RRR) ) is now available.

Revolver Resources Holdings Ltd has notified the market that 3,000,000 options with an exercise price of $0.25, expiring on 26 April 2026, have lapsed unexercised. The cessation of these options slightly simplifies the company’s capital structure by removing a block of potential equity dilution, but does not itself indicate any change in operating strategy or asset base.

The announcement, lodged as an Appendix 3H and dated 27 April 2026, confirms the formal expiry of these convertible securities without conversion into ordinary shares. This routine capital-management disclosure informs investors of the updated number of outstanding securities and helps maintain transparency around Revolver Resources’ potential future share issuance.

data.title: SSY Group Wins Chinese Approvals for Two Cardiovascular Injectables
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SSY Group ( (HK:2005) ) has shared an announcement.

SSY Group Limited has secured production and registration approval in China for its Diltiazem Hydrochloride for Injection (10mg), classified as a type 4 chemical drug and deemed to have passed consistency evaluation. The product targets supraventricular tachycardia, perioperative hypertensive crises, hypertensive emergencies and unstable angina, reinforcing the group’s presence in acute cardiovascular care.

The company has also received approval for Propranolol Hydrochloride Injection in two dosage formats, recognized as a type 3 drug with passed consistency evaluation, following earlier registration approval for its bulk drug. These new approvals broaden SSY Group’s cardiovascular injectable portfolio, enhancing its competitive position in China’s hospital drug market and signaling continued progress in product development that may support future revenue growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2005) stock is a Buy with a HK$5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SSY Group stock, see the HK:2005 Stock Forecast page.

More about SSY Group

SSY Group Limited is a pharmaceutical company based in Hong Kong that develops and manufactures injectable drugs for the hospital and clinical markets. The group focuses on regulated prescription medicines in China, targeting cardiovascular and other critical care indications where high-quality, NMPA-approved injectable formulations are in demand.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

TZ Limited ( (AU:TZL) ) has provided an update.

TZ Limited has notified the ASX of the appointment of Timothy Richardson as a director, effective 27 April 2026, in accordance with Australian listing and corporate disclosure requirements. The company reported that Richardson currently holds no relevant interests in TZ Limited securities, either directly or indirectly, and has no interests in any contracts relating to the company, indicating no immediate equity or contractual alignment at the time of his board appointment.

This clean-interest position may be relevant for governance and independence considerations, suggesting that Richardson joins the board without existing financial ties that could influence his oversight role. The notice reinforces TZ Limited’s compliance with regulatory standards on timely disclosure of changes to its board composition, providing transparency for shareholders and the market about the director’s initial financial standing with the company.

More about TZ Limited

TZ Limited is a publicly listed company on the ASX. The filing does not provide details on its industry, products or services, or market focus, only that it is subject to Australian corporate and listing rules governing director disclosures.
